Welcome to 10X Launches (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 1 of 4
Speaker 1: All right, hello everybody, I am super excited to have you inside 10X Launches. I'm
excited for you, I'm excited for your customers, your family, your friends, your pets, and
quite frankly, just anybody who stands to benefit from you creating your sales
messaging faster and with more genuine impact and results. We're talking about
messages that don't make your audience cringe, but instead really connect to those
deep hidden places within them and really empower them to better their lives in ways
that you and your programs are uniquely equipped to deliver.
Now, this journey really got started a few years ago for me. It started when I was getting
hired to write all these massive launches, and had to do them quick. The most stressful
part wasn't actually the writing itself, but the lack of a clear, repeatable methodology, or
process for doing it. What made it even more challenging was that this was during a
period of time when the online world was suffering from what I call marketing global
health crisis, funnel fever.
This was a time when new launch strategies and funnel strategies were literally popping
up almost every month. We had evergreen webinars, we had normal webinars, we had
three part video series. We had challenges, and Facebook groups, and all sorts of things
popping up, and there was really no replicable system that I could use to write the copy
for them. So every battle really felt vastly different, and that's actually exactly what it
felt like, it felt like battle.
Every time I got hired I felt like a mercenary being called back onto the field with a new
set of tools and weapons, and just trying to rediscover how to use them. Over the past
24 months as even more and more coaches, educators, experts, and influencers have
been coming into the online space and creating and launching online courses and
programs, it's actually become even more imperative to create a highly effective,
efficient, and most importantly, a funnel agnostic process for creating high converting
sales campaigns and copy that doesn't take weeks to put together.
When I say funnel agnostic, what I'm talking about is really we're going to have launch
strategies and funnel strategies that evolve all the time. In the resources section we put
together a few that we're very familiar with, and we know those authors, and they've
really been vetted by ... At the time of this recording, it's 2017 right now, I'd expect that
over the course of the next few months we're going to get even more options and ways
for you to be launching your product, and at the end of the day all of these systems may
be excellent, but unless you have a way of writing the sales messages that plug into
them that's agnostic, that's really a skill, a repeatable process, we're going to run into a
problem. We're going to run into the bottleneck problem.
This is what I really notice, and what spurred the creation of this program is I've noticed
that creating this sales messaging for launches, for funnels, has become the biggest
bottleneck. That's what really sparks those desperate 2:00 AM Skype messages from
people that just got referred from another client, and they're desperate, and they really
need their email copy written for their launch. They've already invested thousands in
their team and ads, and hundreds of man hours, and they've come to the conclusion
that those little innocent email icons on the phone app don't actually write themselves.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Page 2 of 4
It sounds absurd, but that's really what's happening. We get so enamored, so romantic
about the funnels we're using, that we forget that the connective tissue, the thing that
actually brings life to them are the messages we plug into it. That's become a major
bottleneck where for every funnel that gets built ... for every 100 funnels that people set
out to build, how many of them are actually going live? And how many of those that are
going live are actually generating profit? So this is a critical problem we have right now,
and it's actually going to only get bigger as our funnels get more and more complex, and
we get more and more enraptured by them. We still need to learn a repeatable process
for dialing in the messaging and getting that done in an efficient way.
That's the point of this course. It's really to create a repeatable process for doing that, to
give you the confidence to do it yourself. Yes, there may be a time and place to hand it
off to a copywriter, but you'd be shocked how infrequent that time and place arises.
Many of my clients who are super busy, some of the busiest entrepreneurs on the
planet, are still taking the time to learn how to do this. The case study I always like to
refer to is Dan Martell, an incredible entrepreneur, who at one point fired me as his
copywriter and hired me as his copywrite coach. He really acknowledged how vital, how
crucial this skill is, how intimately tied it is to revenue generation, and he decided, "I
need to take ownership of this."
This course, 10X Launches, is really meant to honor the commitment of every
entrepreneur who wants to take ownership of this process, and to actually give them a
learnable and repeatable process for doing it. This is going to work no matter what kind
of launch you're doing. Later on in the course you're actually going to see theme plates
for what I call the minimal viable email funnel, where you literally, actually need nothing
but an email software to launch your products or courses. However, like I said, the
strategies and templates you're going to be learning in this course are going to sync up
with any funnel you are using, they are foundational. We're really talking about the life
blood that goes into any funnel you're building.
So, that's what's coming up ahead. If you are a course creator, a coach, a consultant, an
expert influencer, or any type of online entrepreneur who is launching and selling
products and building funnels with email, this really will be your ticket to more sales in
less time, which will give you the confidence to double down on all those other aspects
of your funnel, knowing, and this is the important part, knowing that you have the
sequence needed to convert those leads into customers.
But, this is actually also for copywriters and launch strategists. This is where I came
from, it's for people who are doing this for a living who are afflicted by knowing that
their time isn't scalable, and even if you do increase your rates to the highest your
market will bear, you'll still ultimately be capped by the amount of time you have to
execute these launches.
So, this is a very strategic, methodical approach and process, that along with the theme
plates you're going to be introduced to later, has really cut down my own fulfillment
time on these launch projects in probably about half, while at the same time also being
able to raise my rates to be in line with the value and results that this method has

generated for my clients. That's the invitation for the copywriters tuning into this, is it
really will give you a way to execute these quicker, while also raising your rates. That's
really the fastest way to get paid more in line with what you're doing.
But regardless of where you fall on that spectrum, here's where I want to invite you to
add a comma to your title. Add a comma, conversion coach, because that's really what
we're doing here. At the heart of what we're doing here we are conversion coaches.
Copywriting may be what you're used to calling the work ahead of us, but this really is
about connecting deeply with your customer, deeper than you ever have before,
acknowledging exactly where they are and knowing that transformation they have to
make between point A and point buyer to really convert in your funnel.
By the end of the course this is what we are going for. You will know exactly what kind
of email to send out, what time to move your leads along that buying journey, and you
will know the right questions to ask to drive the content for those messages. We talk so
much about where does great copy come from? Of course, we do have our quantitative
data, we also have our survey results, we have all that, but the best messages, the best
messages come from the conversion coach who's willing to just sit with it and peer just a
little bit deeper and say, "Where did this response come from? What is driving this
person to answer in this way, and what are the underlying thoughts and beliefs and
attitudes that are driving that?" That really gives us a chance to dig deeper and really hit
those underlying precursors that lead to greater conversions.
By the end of this course you will also buy more effortlessness and ease in the process.
Right now it's so daunting when entrepreneurs flip open the MacBook, open up a new
Google Doc, and get faced with this blank page and have no idea what to go here, and
they kind of just [inaudible 00:09:35] with it, they just wing it. They're pressured by
these deadlines and they just have to get it out. That's where you put on your, better
done than perfect cap, and just write whatever feels good without really relying on
strategy, and without actually being confident that what you're writing is really
strategically designed to convert.
That's what we're doing here, we are creating, and you're going to learn how to create
buyers by coaching the conversion instead of forcing it. One of the world's top coaches,
Rich Litvin, actually talks a lot about this, about creating clients, clients are created. If
you are a coach, if you are an educator, why would you wait until someone is in your
program officially before coaching or educating them? That really starts the moment
they opt in, the moment they come into our ecosystem we have a chance to create a
client, create a buyer by really coaching that conversion. Coaching who they must
become to be a perfect client, instead of just ramming sale messages down their throat
and hoping that one or two of them chokes on it. So, that's one thing we're doing here,
and finally the reason I'm sure most of you joined, it's to really generate record breaking
results in your launches and funnels with far less effort or laboring over your email copy.
This is the biggy. I've worked on probably over a dozen six and seven figure launches by
now, and people always have asked me, "What is it about your copy that does this?"
They're always looking for that formula, that tool, that way of turning a phrase, and it
